bug.description: race condition between timer expiry handler and normal message processing

prompt:
There is a race condition between timer expiry handler and normal message processing downstream of function decode_pdn_disconnect_reject in the openair3/NAS/COMMON subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/COMMON/ESM/MSG/PdnDisconnectReject.c:32.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
